title: std-d-db-sub-auditee-audited-sub-count-vs-sub-audit-type-name
description: PI (Primary Identifier) execution analysis across sub-audit types — covers top PI-gap sub-audits, found vs not-found breakdown, not-found reasons, and 100% execution sub-audits.

totalRecords.description: Total number of PI records across all sub-audit types.

totalSubAudits.description: Total number of distinct sub-audit types in this analysis.

topSubAuditsByPINotFound.description: Top 3 sub-audit types with the highest count of PI Not Found, sorted descending by piNotFoundCount.

totalPICount.description: Total PI keys in this sub-audit.

piNotFoundCount.description: Number of PIs marked as Not Found.

piNotFoundPercent.description: Percentage of PIs Not Found out of totalPICount, rounded to 2 decimal places.

piFoundVsNotFoundSummary.description: Aggregate PI found vs not-found statistics across all sub-audit types, plus top 3 sub-audits by total PI volume.

avgPIFoundCount.description: Average number of PI Found across all sub-audits (1 decimal place).

avgPINotFoundCount.description: Average number of PI Not Found across all sub-audits (1 decimal place).

avgPIFoundPercent.description: Average PI Found percentage across all sub-audits (2 decimal places).

topSubAuditsByTotalPI.description: Top 3 sub-audits sorted by totalPICount descending, with full found/not-found breakdown.

piNotFoundReasonAnalysis.description: Analysis of PI Not Found reasons. Top 5 sub-audits (by piNotFoundCount) each with up to 5 reasons. The AI narrator identifies recurring cross-sub-audit patterns from this data.

topSubAuditsWithReasons.description: Top 5 sub-audits by piNotFoundCount, each with their top 5 Not Found reasons sorted by count descending. Narrator uses this to identify the most recurring reasons across sub-audits.

topReasons.description: Up to 5 most frequent Not Found reasons for this sub-audit, sorted by count descending.

fullPIExecutionSubAudits.description: Sub-audit types that achieved 100% PI execution (zero PI Not Found), with count, percentage, and top 5 by total PI volume.

percentSubAuditsWithFullExecution.description: Percentage of all sub-audits that achieved 100% PI execution (2 decimal places).

top5ByTotalPI.description: Up to 5 sub-audits with 100% PI execution, sorted by totalPICount descending (most validated first).

totalPICount.description: Total PI keys validated (all found) in this sub-audit.
